name: Cinnamon Sugared Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Beat egg whites lightly with salt.
3. Sift together sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, cloves, and allspice and mix well.
4. Add pecans to egg whites and coat completely.
5. Transfer pecans, leaving space between nuts, to the cinnamon sugar mixture.
6. Coat pecans completely.
7. Place on parchment-lined baking sheet.
8. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, until sugar coating on nuts is crisp.
9. Cool and serve or store in an airtight container.
